seoTitle: Macquarie Links vs Macquarie Marshes — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Macquarie Links and Macquarie Marshes. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Macquarie Links vs Macquarie Marshes: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Macquarie Links and Macquarie Marshes.
heading: Macquarie Links vs Macquarie Marshes — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Macquarie Links, New South Wales and Macquarie Marshes, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Macquarie Marshes has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Macquarie Links (49/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Macquarie Links or Macquarie Marshes safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Macquarie Links has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Macquarie Marshes scores 58/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Macquarie Links scores 50/100 for bushfire risk. Macquarie Marshes scores 23/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Macquarie Links or Macquarie Marshes?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Macquarie Marshes has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.8% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
